backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with a comment indicating authentication is handled by Internet Identity; no backend methods implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that production-ready URLs and configurations are implemented in frontend/index.html with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, configuration, and entry points for the AnimateAI video animation application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color values for consistent theming across the application.
frontend/index.html: Production-ready HTML entry point with comprehensive SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, theme color, and preconnect to Internet Identity service.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component managing video upload workflow state (file, style, intensity, progress) and rendering all page sections with theme provider and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ComparisonPrevie: Side-by-side comparison component displaying original and animated video previews with HD quality badge on the animated version.
frontend/src/components/DownloadButton.t: Download button component with HD badge that triggers a success toast notification when clicked.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Accordion-based FAQ section with 7 questions covering video formats, processing time, commercial use, styles, trials, quality, and subscription cancellation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand info, navigation links (Product, Company, Legal), social media icons, copyright notice, and caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with logo, navigation menu (Create, How It Works, Pricing, FAQ), theme toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality. Includes responsive mobile menu with hamburger toggle.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Landing hero section with background image overlay, main headline promoting AI video-to-animation conversion, CTA buttons (Get Started, Watch Demo), and stats display (10K+ videos, 6 styles, HD quality).
frontend/src/components/HowItWorks.tsx: Four-step process section explaining the workflow: Upload video, Choose Style, Animate with AI, and Download. Displays steps in a responsive grid with icons and descriptions.
Slider component for adjusting animation intensity (0-100) with labels (Subtle/Moderate/Intense) and visual feedback showing current selection level.
frontend/src/components/PricingPlans.tsx: Pricing section displaying three tiers (Free, Pro, Studio) with features, pricing, and CTAs. Pro plan is highlighted as most popular with special styling.
frontend/src/components/ProgressIndicato: Progress bar component showing video processing status with percentage, animated spinner, and dynamic status messages (Analyzing, Applying style, Rendering, Finalizing).
frontend/src/components/StyleSelector.ts: Grid of six animation style options (Cartoon, Anime, Pixar 3D, Whiteboard, Comic Book, Watercolor) with preview images, descriptions, and selection state management.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Customer testimonials section displaying six 5-star reviews from various user roles (Content Creator, Marketing Director, etc.) in a responsive grid layout with avatars.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Theme switcher button component that toggles between light and dark modes using next-themes, displaying sun/moon icons with smooth transitions.
frontend/src/components/VideoUpload.tsx: React component for video file upload with drag-and-drop support, accepts MP4/MOV/AVI formats up to 500MB, displays uploaded file info with remove option.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages backend actor instances based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Minimal React Query hooks file providing backend connection status check using the actor hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom teal/orange futuristic theme, dark mode support, custom animations (fadeIn, slideUp, scaleIn), and utility classes for glass effects and gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended utilities for animations, shadows, fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), and responsive container settings.
project_state.json: Project metadata documenting this as a frontend-only video-to-animation UI mockup with 13 implemented features, noting that actual video processing/AI conversion is not supported on this platform.
